description: Smart as a whip and relentlessly polite, 1st Lieutenant Farlow is one of the most beloved and respected officers in SWAT. A master tactician in hostage and barricade situations, Farlow quickly climbed the SWAT ranks. Don't be fooled by her overwhelmingly cheerful nature--she can dispatch bad guys in the blink of an eye and not think twice about it. What are they doing over there? Drinking milkshakes?
name: 1st Lieutenant Farlow | SWAT
